description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the iconic character Mickey Mouse, featuring a large round head with prominent black mouse ears and a white face. The toy has expressive oval eyes, a small black nose, and a simple, friendly mouth. Its body is dressed in bright red shorts with two white buttons, yellow shoes, and white gloves, all of which are classic elements of Mickey Mouse's design. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are straight, giving the toy a welcoming and open appearance. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of fabric plush toys, with visible stitching details on the clothing and shoes. The overall proportions and color scheme are faithful to the original cartoon character, making it instantly recognizable.
description: A soft, plush Mickey Mouse stuffed toy with outstretched arms, red shorts, yellow shoes, and classic cartoon features. The toy is detailed with a friendly face, white gloves, and a soft, fabric surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing Mickey Mouse's face, outstretched arms, red shorts, yellow shoes, and white gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side of the body and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, body, and the back of the red shorts and yellow shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and the side of the body and shoes.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with wide open eyes and a small, simple smile. The eyebrows are not prominent, giving the face a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs straight. The head is facing forward.
